commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch retries `file_lock_stale` from `acquireSessionWriteLock`, converts eventual stale/timeout failures to `SessionWriteLockTimeoutError`, and adds Linux regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +22. Total +57 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source/proof rather than local execution: `@openclaw/fs-safe` can throw `file_lock_stale`, current main rethrows it, and the PR comment supplies a runtime persistence proof for the reported stderr leak path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the timeout budget and update the focused regression test; maintainers still decide final merge ordering for the overlapping session-lock PRs.

target.title: fix(agents): retry stale session lock reports
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #87340.

acquireSessionWriteLock() could surface the raw file_lock_stale error from the sidecar lock manager when a stale-lock observation raced with recovery. In agent/tool execution that raw lock-manager message can look like actionable tool stderr even though the correct session-write behavior is to keep treating it as contention until the configured acquire timeout expires.

This change keeps stale lock reports inside the session write-lock policy: retry briefly within the existing acquire timeout, and if the lock remains unavailable, raise the existing SessionWriteLockTimeoutError shape instead of leaking file lock stale for ...

No config surface or plugin surface changes.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: recovered or racey stale session write-lock reports no longer surface as raw file_lock_stale / file lock stale for ... errors during session journal acquisition.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw Linux/WSL source worktree on current origin/main, Node via the repository Vitest wrapper.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/session-write-lock.test.ts --reporter=dot
./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/session-write-lock.ts src/agents/session-write-lock.test.ts
./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/session-write-lock.ts src/agents/session-write-lock.test.ts
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
Test Files 2 passed (2)
Tests 84 passed (84)
All matched files use the correct format.
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD: passed
git diff --check: passed
```

Observed result after fix: A regression case that forces one file_lock_stale report and then makes the lock recoverable now retries and acquires the session write lock instead of exposing the raw stale-lock message.

What was not tested: Full repository CI locally; broad changed-gate proof is left to CI/Testbox because this Codex worktree is linked and direct pnpm gates can trigger dependency reconciliation prompts.
